title: Wholesome Mexican Egg Yolks Tacos
description: Floral, shaggy, hangover-cure Mexican dish featuring egg yolks and render-fat, whole30-friendly.
instructions: Heat the lard in a large skillet over medium heat.
Chop the onion and add to the skillet. Cook until translucent.
Mince the garlic and add to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute.
Chop the cactus pads into small pieces and add to the skillet. Cook for 2 minutes.
Push the mixture to one side of the skillet.
Crack the egg yolks into the other side of the skillet.
Scramble the egg yolks until cooked through.
Mix the egg yolks with the other ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tacos with a squeeze of lime juice.
Assemble the tacos with the egg mixture and any desired toppings.
Tacos are best served fresh, but can be refrigerated for up to 24 hours and reheated in the skillet.
